case_title: REBECCAN WILES VS. F O 618 BUSH STREET ST PROPERTY, LLC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) EZEQUIEL CAZARES, REGIONAL DIRECTOR FILED BY DEFENDANT F O 618 BUSH STREET ST PROPERTY, LLC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR A PROGRESS REPORT. MATTER CONTINUED TO APRIL 29, 2021 AT 3:30 P.M. DEPARTMENT 506. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-29-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF REBECCAN WILES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT F O 618 BUSH STREET PROPERTY, LLC, REPRESENTED BY DARWIN GARZA, SENIOR MULTI SITE PROPERTY MANAGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICE. COURT RECESS AT 2:43 P.M. MATTER IS RECALLED AT 2:50 P.M. PARTIES AGREE TO A SETTLEMENT FOR $2,590.00 WHICH INCLUDES COURT COSTS. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF PAYMENT IS MADE AS AGREED AND THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. IF PAYMENT IS NOT MADE AS AGREED, AN APPEARANCE WILL BE REQUIRED AND JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES. CASE SETTLED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES. CASE SETTLED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,666.67 FILED BY WILES, REBECCAN AS TO DEFENDANT F O 618 BUSH STREET ST PROPERTY, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
